case_title: RESILIENCE HOMES LLC VS. MARGIE LEE EARLES ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESILIENCE HOMES LLC
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESILIENCE HOMES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT EARLES, MARGIE LEE
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (NO SASE. ENDORSED COPY PLACED IN D501 OUTBOX)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESILIENCE HOMES LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESILIENCE HOMES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EARLES, MARGIE LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 147 VERNON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94123, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESILIENCE HOMES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EARLES, MARGIE LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $510.00 COSTS, $8,600.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,110.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESILIENCE HOMES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT EARLES, MARGIE LEE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $200.00 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESILIENCE HOMES LLC
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $510.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT EARLES, MARGIE LEE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESILIENCE HOMES LLC SERVED AUG-22-2019, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT EARLES, MARGIE LEE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT EARLES, MARGIE LEE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT EARLES, MARGIE LEE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT EARLES, MARGIE LEE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESILIENCE HOMES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT EARLES, MARGIE LEE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
